mainEntity.name: Child support impact from lost wages after forklift injury Murray UT?
mainEntity.text: Child support impact from lost wages after forklift injury Murray UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp TTD counts as income; arrears pause during total disability. Notify CSE.

suggestedAnswer.text: Murray courts impute pre-injury wages sometimes. Affidavit of disability protects license.

name: Child Support After Forklift Wage Loss Murray
description: Comp TTD counts as income; arrears pause during total disability. Notify CSE.
